_comment_: Zaude framework config. Install to ~/.zaude/config.json. Remove underscore-prefixed comment keys before use.
_comment_cwd_to_project: Explicit map of cwd-basename → vault-project-slug for projects whose working-directory name doesn't match the vault folder name. Leave {} if your cwd names match your vault folders.
_comment_frozen_zones: List of path substrings Claude must never write to. Used by frozen-guard.py. Example: ['legacy-app', 'production-vendor-dir']. Leave [] to disable.
_comment_zaude_repo_path: Absolute path to your local clone of the Zaude repo (github.com/ziadmomen10/zaude). Required only if you want to use /zaude-push or auto_sync. Leave empty to disable.
_comment_auto_sync: If true, SessionEnd hook auto-invokes zaude-sync.sh in non-interactive mode when a framework file (hook/command/pattern) was touched during the session. Always creates a PR, never commits to main directly. Default false — you have to explicitly opt in.
_comment_sync_private_markers: Additional strings (beyond the default list in zaude-sync.sh) that should BLOCK a sync if found in added/changed content. Add anything specific to your org that must never leak into the public Zaude repo. Default list already includes common UltaHost markers; override or extend here.
_comment_sync_exclude: Path patterns (relative to ~/.claude/ or $vault_path) that should never sync to Zaude even if they change. Example: ['hooks/my-private-hook.py']. Leave [] to sync all known framework targets.
